zh.lifeSummary: 當David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl於1309年1月24日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl24歲，母親Jeanne Comyn17歲。他於大約1329年與Catherine de Beaumont在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1335年11月30日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl于1309年1月24日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl24岁，母亲Jeanne Comyn17岁。他于大约1329年与Catherine de Beaumont在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1335年11月30日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl was born on 24 January 1309, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, was 24 and his mother, Jeanne Comyn, was 17. He married Catherine de Beaumont about 1329, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 30 November 1335, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl est né le 24 janvier 1309, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Comyn, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Beaumont environ 1329, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1335, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl am 24. Januar 1309 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl 24 und seine Mutter Jeanne Comyn 17. Er hat um 1329 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Catherine de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 30. November 1335 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Athollが1309年1月24日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Athollは24歳，母Jeanne Comynは17歳であった。約1329年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンでCatherine de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1335年11月30日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで26歳で死去した。

ko.St. Nicholas, Newcastle, Northumberland,: 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl(이)가 1309년 1월 24일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Comyn(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 Catherine de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1335년 11월 30일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl nasceu em 24 de janeiro de 1309, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Comyn, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Beaumont aproximadamente 1329, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1335, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 26 anos.

ru.St. Nicholas, Newcastle, Northumberland,: ст ничолас, нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl родился 24 января 1309 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Comyn, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Beaumont около 1329 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 30 ноября 1335 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl nació el 24 de enero de 1309, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jeanne Comyn, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Catherine de Beaumont aproximadamente 1329, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1335, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 26 años.
